summary: Strong unit and integration test suite covering all major requirements: cartesian product, exclude/include rules, validation, and strategy fields are thoroughly tested. CLI parsing and full GitHub Actions workflow execution via act are well-validated. Test organization is clean with good fixture usage and proper isolation/cleanup. Weaknesses: some edge cases in include/exclude behavior untested (no overlap scenarios, conflicting rules), file system errors (missing files, permission denied) not tested, and error message validation could be more rigorous. The act-based workflow integration testing with multiple fixtures is particularly sophisticated and would catch most regressions in the core functionality.
